source_description: Remediate the non-blocking findings from the cts1-conformance-harness mission review: RISK-1/RISK-2 (reference-resolution hardening: URI-scheme rejection, opt-in containment, leak sanitization), RISK-3 (Node-based invariant guards), DRIFT-2 (RFC-1 §7.2 reference documentation + trust model). DRIFT-1 (local Ollama acceptance) is explicitly out of scope pending reboot.
